2604.25421.title: FED-FSTQ: Fisher-Guided Token Quantization for Communication-Efficient Federated Fine-Tuning of LLMs on Edge Devices
2604.25421.paper_summary: Federated fine-tuning provides a practical route to adapt large language models (LLMs) on edge devices without centralizing private data, yet in mobile deployments the training wall-clock is often bottlenecked by straggler-limited uplink communication under heterogeneous bandwidth and intermittent participation. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) reduces trainable parameters, per-round payloads remain prohibitive in non-IID regimes, where uniform compression can discard rare but task-critical signals. We propose Fed-FSTQ, a Fisher-guided token quantization system primitive for communication-efficient federated LLM fine-tuning. Fed-FSTQ employs a lightweight Fisher proxy to estimate token sensitivity, coupling importance-aware token selection with non-uniform mixed-precision quantization to allocate higher fidelity to informative evidence while suppressing redundant transmission. The method is model-agnostic, serves as a drop-in module for standard federated PEFT pipelines, e.g., LoRA, without modifying the server aggregation rule, and supports bandwidth-heterogeneous clients via compact sparse message packing. Experiments on multilingual QA and medical QA under non-IID partitions show that Fed-FSTQ reduces cumulative uplink traffic required to reach a fixed quality threshold by 46x relative to a standard LoRA baseline, and improves end-to-end wall-clock time-to-accuracy by 52%. Furthermore, enabling Fisher-guided token reduction at inference yields up to a 1.55x end-to-end speedup on NVIDIA Jetson-class edge devices, demonstrating deployability under tight resource constraints.
2604.25421.paper_summary_zh: 聯邦微調提供了一條實用的途徑，讓大型語言模型（LLMs）在邊緣設備上進行調整，而不需要集中私密數據，然而在移動部署中，訓練的實際時間往往受到異質帶寬和間歇性參與下的拖延者限制。雖然參數高效微調（PEFT）減少了可訓練的參數，但在非獨立同分佈（non-IID）環境中，每輪的負載仍然過於高昂，因為均勻壓縮可能會丟棄稀有但對任務至關重要的信號。我們提出了Fed-FSTQ，一種基於Fisher的令牌量化系統原語，用於通信高效的聯邦LLM微調。Fed-FSTQ使用輕量級的Fisher代理來估計令牌的敏感性，將重要性感知的令牌選擇與非均勻混合精度量化相結合，以便在抑制冗餘傳輸的同時，為信息豐富的證據分配更高的保真度。該方法與模型無關，作為標準聯邦PEFT管道（例如，LoRA）的即插即用模塊，無需修改服務器聚合規則，並通過緊湊的稀疏消息打包支持帶寬異質的客戶端。在非獨立同分佈的分區下，對多語言問答和醫療問答的實驗表明，Fed-FSTQ相對於標準LoRA基準減少了達到固定質量閾值所需的累積上行流量46倍，並將端到端的時間-準確度提升了52%。此外，在推理時啟用Fisher引導的令牌減少，能在NVIDIA Jetson級邊緣設備上實現高達1.55倍的端到端加速，顯示出在資源緊張的情況下的可部署性。
2604.25421.author: Changyu Li et.al.
2604.25421.authors: Changyu Li, Shuanghong Huang, Jiashen Liu, Ming Lei, Jidu Xing, Kaishun Wu, Lu Wang, Fei Luo
